allow: PowerShell($items = Get-ChildItem -Path "c:\\Projects\\fiae-lernplattform" -Recurse -Force -Exclude ".git" | Where-Object { !$_.PSIsContainer }; $items | Select-Object -ExpandProperty FullName | ForEach-Object { $_.Replace\("c:\\Projects\\fiae-lernplattform\\", ""\) } | Sort-Object)

PowerShell(Set-Location "c:\\Projects\\fiae-lernplattform"; $result = npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1; $result | Where-Object { $_ -match "MasterFile" } | Select-Object -First 20; Write-Host "--- EXIT: $LASTEXITCODE")
PowerShell(Set-Location "c:\\Projects\\fiae-lernplattform"; npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | Out-String | Select-String -Pattern "MasterFile" -AllMatches | ForEach-Object { $_.Line })
PowerShell(Set-Location "c:\\Projects\\fiae-lernplattform"; npx tsc --noEmit > tsc_out.txt 2>&1; Get-Content tsc_out.txt | Where-Object { $_ -match "MasterFile" })

PowerShell($paths = @\("$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Android\\Sdk", "C:\\Android\\Sdk", "C:\\Users\\$env:USERNAME\\AppData\\Local\\Android\\Sdk"\); foreach \($p in $paths\) { if \(Test-Path $p\) { Write-Host "Found: $p"; Get-ChildItem $p -Name | Select-Object -First 5 } })

PowerShell($sdk = "C:\\Users\\aryan\\AppData\\Local\\Android\\Sdk"; Get-ChildItem "$sdk\\build-tools" -Name | Select-Object -Last 3; Get-ChildItem "$sdk\\platforms" -Name -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -Last 5; Get-ChildItem "$sdk\\emulator" -Name "emulator.exe" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1)
